project_reference.core_research_question: Can entangled CFT sectors produce or sharply diagnose cosmological singularities, and can boundary observables distinguish singularity resolution from singularity avoidance?
project_reference.current_focus: Benchmark the verified entangled-CFT cosmology papers against Kasner/QES/two-point-function diagnostics and sharpen the boundary observable needed to distinguish singularity resolution from avoidance.

scope.question: Can entangled multi-CFT states produce or diagnose cosmological singularities in a way that is sharper than existing Kasner-like holographic probes?
in_scope: Benchmark the Antonini-Sasieta-Swingle random-entanglement cosmology against established holographic singularity papers
Identify boundary observables based on entanglement, quantum extremal surfaces, or complexity that could diagnose the singular region
Separate claims of singularity avoidance, singularity resolution, and diagnostic blindness
out_of_scope: Numerical quantum gravity resolution of the singularity
Phenomenological cosmology or observational data fitting
Claiming a microscopic CFT Hamiltonian realization unless the literature provides one
unresolved_questions: Which boundary observable, if any, can distinguish the entangled-CFT cosmology from generic Kasner-like singularity avoidance?
Does the Antonini construction imply resolution of the singularity or only an emergent semiclassical cosmological patch?

context_gaps: No decisive boundary observable has yet been selected as the primary benchmark for singularity diagnosis.
crucial_inputs: Two entangled CFT sectors as the boundary description of a cosmological spacetime
Benchmark behaviour of HRT/QES surfaces and complexity near Kasner-like singularities
Whether the boundary construction delivers singularity resolution, avoidance, or only coarse-grained entanglement-structure arguments

formulations: entangled multi-CFT cosmology in the Antonini-Sasieta-Swingle construction
Kasner-like holographic singularities as benchmark backgrounds
extremal-surface and complexity diagnostics as comparison tools
allowed_estimator_families: holographic entanglement or quantum extremal surface diagnostics
complexity-based singularity diagnostics used only alongside entanglement and correlator benchmarks
forbidden_estimator_families: qualitative ER=EPR analogies with no explicit benchmark observable
claims of singularity resolution based only on generic bulk encoding or entanglement structure
complexity-only conclusions with no entanglement or geometry cross-check
allowed_fit_families: analytic asymptotic comparison across benchmark papers
structured comparison tables tied to explicit arXiv anchors
forbidden_fit_families: post-hoc narrative matching without reference geometry
stop_and_rethink_conditions: Candidate observables fail to distinguish the Antonini construction from generic Kasner-like singularity avoidance
The project starts implying microscopic singularity resolution without a concrete CFT anchor or benchmark computation
All support for the central claim reduces to entropy counting with no dynamical or geometric diagnostic

observables.name: Boundary-state to bulk-geometry map
observables.definition: Classification of which entangled boundary states support semiclassical cosmological patches and what kind of singular behaviour they encode

observables.name: Singularity-probe behaviour of HRT/QES/complexity surfaces
observables.definition: Whether benchmark surfaces approach, avoid, or terminate before the singular region in the relevant holographic cosmologies

observables.name: Decisive boundary diagnostic
observables.definition: Candidate boundary observable that could separate singularity resolution from singularity avoidance or diagnostic blindness

claims.statement: The Antonini random-entanglement cosmology must be benchmarked against established holographic singularity diagnostics before any claim about singularity resolution from entangled CFTs is considered trustworthy.

deliverables.description: Literature map connecting entangled-CFT cosmology to earlier holographic singularity work
Comparison matrix of candidate observables for singularity diagnostics across benchmark papers
Project scope note with anchors, non-goals, and target results

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Cross-reference the primary Antonini construction with the Engelhardt, Frenkel, Manu, Narayan, and Sahu benchmark papers and record the observable-level overlaps and mismatches.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Each must-read reference appears in the literature map with at least one explicit role in the project.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Populate an observable matrix that marks whether each benchmark paper supports singularity avoidance, singularity resolution, or only indirect diagnosis.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The matrix covers the main project observables and states at least one unresolved ambiguity.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Review project scope to ensure no deliverable claims microscopic singularity resolution without an explicit benchmark computation or CFT anchor.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Project artifacts keep singularity resolution open unless a benchmarked calculation supports it.

references.why_it_matters: Primary entangled-CFT cosmology construction under study

aliases: Cosmological singularities entanglement and quantum extremal surfaces
references.why_it_matters: Primary quantum extremal surface benchmark near cosmological singularities

aliases: Holographic flows from CFT to the Kasner universe
references.why_it_matters: Provides an explicit holographic flow from CFT data to Kasner cosmology for comparison
Early holographic benchmark for field-theory probes of cosmological singularities

aliases: Cosmological singularities holographic complexity and entanglement
references.why_it_matters: Latest entanglement and complexity benchmark for Kasner-like singularities
Recent nearby entangled multi-CFT cosmology benchmark for comparing structural features without overclaiming diagnostics

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-main
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Treating generic entanglement-wedge encoding or random entanglement as sufficient evidence for singularity resolution
forbidden_proxies.reason: Bulk encoding alone does not establish what happens to the singular region

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-main
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Using vanishing near-singularity complexity alone as evidence for singularity resolution
forbidden_proxies.reason: Complexity behaviour is informative but not by itself decisive about microscopic resolution

weakest_anchors: No decisive boundary observable yet separates singularity resolution from singularity avoidance in the Antonini construction
unvalidated_assumptions: Random-entanglement states faithfully capture a microscopic holographic CFT sector relevant for cosmological singularities
competing_explanations: The entangled-CFT construction may encode only a coarse-grained semiclassical patch rather than a resolved singular geometry
Observed extremal-surface avoidance may be universal and therefore non-diagnostic of genuine resolution
disconfirming_observations: If every benchmark observable shows only the same avoidance behaviour found in earlier Kasner-like papers, the project cannot claim new singularity resolution from entanglement alone

position.last_activity: Re-audited the citations against arXiv, corrected the Antonini and Sahu benchmark descriptions, restored the Engelhardt correlator benchmark, and drafted a manuscript-ready synthesis.

intermediate_results.description: Antonini-Sasieta-Swingle construct entangled microstates of a pair of holographic CFTs whose dual semiclassical description includes big-bang/big-crunch AdS cosmologies, with the cosmology encoded in one CFT's entanglement wedge.
Quantum extremal surfaces in cosmological singularity backgrounds are driven away from the singularity into the semiclassical region.
Irrelevant deformations of the CFT can drive holographic flows to Kasner universes, providing explicit singular benchmark geometries.
Boundary two-point correlators of large-dimension operators in anisotropic Kasner holography show strong horizon-scale signatures of the singularity.
Complexity surfaces near Kasner-like singularities become lightlike in the interior and contribute vanishingly near the singularity; entanglement probes show similar IR bending-away behaviour.
Sahu and Van Raamsdonk construct big-bang/big-crunch cosmological spacetimes dual to entangled states of multiple holographic CFTs associated with black-hole second asymptotic regions.

Current working hypothesis: the entangled-CFT cosmology should first be interpreted as a benchmarked singularity-diagnostic framework, not as a demonstrated mechanism of microscopic singularity resolution.
intermediate_results.validity: Supported by current literature comparison and open questions

open_questions: Which boundary observable, if any, can distinguish the entangled-CFT cosmology from generic Kasner-like singularity avoidance?
Does the Antonini construction imply resolution of the singularity or only an emergent semiclassical cosmological patch?
What concrete CFT operation or coupling prepares the entangled boundary state beyond the random-state ansatz of Antonini et al.?
Do all known HRT/QES probes in Kasner-like holographic benchmarks bend away from the singularity, or is there a counterexample in the current literature?
Can complexity observables add information beyond entanglement in diagnosing the singular region, or do they simply mirror the same avoidance behaviour?

decisions.summary: Initialized project scope for entangled-CFT cosmology
decisions.rationale: Need benchmarked scope before any derivation or singularity-resolution claim

approximations.name: Large-N classical gravity limit
approximations.validity_range: Semiclassical holographic regime away from the singular core

approximations.name: Random entanglement / typical-state ansatz
approximations.validity_range: Large Hilbert space and coarse-grained entropy observables

approximations.name: Semiclassical extremal-surface approximation
approximations.validity_range: Bulk region far from stringy or Planckian singular behaviour
approximations.current_value: assumed small away from the crunch

convention_lock.natural_units: c = hbar = 1 with AdS radius L explicit
convention_lock.coordinate_system: Conformal time eta, comoving spatial slices, holographic radial coordinate z

propagated_uncertainties.quantity: Microscopic preparation of the entangled CFT state
Universality of complexity thinning near singularity
